title: Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Wicketfishing.jpg]] |title=''Wicket Goes Fishing:
An Ewok Adventure'' |author=[[Melinda Luke]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[A. O. Williams]] |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]] |early release= |release date=[[1986]]{{InsiderCite|74|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: Star Wars Storybook 101|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: ''Star Wars'' Storybook 101}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type= |pages= |isbn=0394879716 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure''''' is a softback children's book by [[Melinda Luke]] and illustrated by [[A. O. Williams]]. It was published in [[1986]] by [[Happy House]], an imprint of [[Random House]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Continuity== This book shows the Ewoks living at ground level rather than fifty meters up in their [[Bright Tree Village|tree village]]. In a flashback scene, Wicket is but a [[Wokling/Legends|wokling]], yet he is wearing a hood not given to him until a later date. ==Legacy== [[Pablo Hidalgo]] of the [[Lucasfilm Story Group]] is seen reading this book in the [[Rebels Recon]] segment for the ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' episode "[[The Holocrons of Fate]]." He claims he is "doing research."{{RebelsRecon|UiXf--t6oZE|#3.02: Inside "The Holocrons of Fate" | Star Wars Rebels|sw_url=video/rebels-recon-inside-the-holocrons-of-fate}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure}} {{App |characters= *[[Baga]] *[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] *[[Shodu Warrick]] *[[Winda Warrick]] *[[Weechee Warrick]] {{Flash}} *[[Logray/Legends|Logray]] }} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|74|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: Star Wars Storybook 101|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: ''Star Wars'' Storybook 101}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Ewok Adventure books]]
